name: Oneohtrix Point Never
bio: Oneohtrix Point Never is Daniel Lopatin's experimental electronic project, spanning ambient collage, synthetic pop, and film-score-adjacent catalog work.
notable_for: Experimental electronic production, soundtrack crossover, and deep critical-canon recognition.
career_highlight: Work across solo records, film scoring, and high-profile collaborations widened the catalog's long-tail value.
revenue_drivers: Streaming from a loyal specialist audience supports the core catalog.
Film and media associations improve sync-style visibility.
Critical-canon status helps older records keep being rediscovered.
